goal: Add a safe M6-verification-only resume mode for the real-adapter RC runner so operators can capture live no-fake endpoint evidence once, update M6 review docs to GO after review, and then run only the M6 GO verifier against that existing endpoint evidence before bundle assembly and v0 readiness. This reduces repeated endpoint capture during closeout without weakening endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 acceptance policy.
head: b82d64d
blocked_scope: Changing endpoint capture, adapter intake, bundle, M6 verifier, or v0 readiness acceptance policy
Editing M6 review signoff/CTO docs to claim GO
Pulling Docker images, running CUDA training, or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a M6-verification-only resume mode to run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py, update the generated real-adapter CUDA handoff command sequence and focused tests, refresh current NOT_GO verification artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: M6-verification-only mode refuses to run unless a prior endpoint-evidence-only summary and live endpoint evidence are present
M6-verification-only mode runs only the M6 verifier, preserves prior adapter_intake and endpoint_capture step evidence, and claims M6-RC GO only if the M6 verifier returns GO
Generated handoff now captures endpoint evidence first, stops for M6 review docs GO, then resumes with --m6-verification-only before bundle assembly
Current local M6/v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not edit docs/reviews/M6 to GO and does not claim release readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped closeout-resume gate for M6 verification from existing live endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed endpoint-first handoff captures live evidence, then currently reruns endpoint capture during full M6 gate after docs GO.
phase_notes.build: Added --m6-verification-only to require prior endpoint-only evidence continuity and then run only verify_m6_rc_evidence.py; updated the generated CUDA handoff to use this mode after the M6 review-doc GO marker check.
phase_notes.check: Focused runner/handoff tests passed, handoff artifacts regenerated, current M6/v0 readiness remained expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the only release blocker, and M1 smoke bootstrap passed in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: M6-verification-only real-adapter RC runner mode, generated CUDA handoff sequence, focused tests, refreshed NOT_GO artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 review doc GO edit, no Docker/CUDA execution, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
